title: Anything Blocks
description: Minecraft mod that lets players convert various items - from materials to food - into blocks. Its main purpose is compact storage, saving space and simplifying resource management.
body:
# Anything Blocks

![Mod Loader](https://img.shields.io/badge/Mod%20Loader-Fabric-lightyellow?logo=data:image/png;base64,)
![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Enviroment-Client_and_Server-purple)
![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Language-Java_21-orange)
![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-red)

![Food Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2cbd263e3ddc43c06ba94a8df84bf025d94c7f8d.png)

**Anything Blocks** is a Minecraft mod that allows players to transform a wide variety of items—ranging from materials to food—into **blocks**. The core purpose of the mod is resource compactness, enabling efficient storage and organization. By converting items into block form, players can save inventory space, simplify transportation, and create more streamlined storage systems. The mod supports a broad range of items, making it versatile for both survival and creative gameplay.

- _Unique_ (and _seamless connected_) textures and interactions
- _100%_ efficient for resource storage
- _Great_ optimized

![Golden Carrot Block Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f4d5c5d554ce73802f2041de4bd48802c1c9c7d.png)

![Sweet Berries Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a994e99f249edd43092a51f6a9dac7cf1e2076c.png)
